expressions.text: An attempt was made to execute a program block containing a function M in one of the following situations which are not permitted:

evidence.snippet:
ERROR
type: Standard: Optional:
effect: Alarm with immediate arrest and control
An attempt was made to execute a program block containing a function M in one of the following situations which are not permitted:
• spindle removal when the bypass function is activated;
• spindle orientation
